_comment: Reference shape for what smoke.sh should observe. smoke.sh enforces verdicts + bbox tolerance inline rather than diffing against this file, but this document captures the contract.

measurements.circles_top: 5 holes (1 bore ≈20 mm, 4 clearance ≈3.2 mm) + 4 counterbores ≈6 mm

override_render._note: -D plate_t=8 must produce a front.png that differs byte-for-byte from the default render
